# Stock Availability

Each product page shows a live stock count drawn from the nearest fulfilment centre. When fewer than five units remain the page displays a low-stock banner, and when the count reaches zero shoppers can join a restock waitlist that emails them the moment inventory returns. Stock figures refresh every fifteen minutes, so a number seen at checkout may differ slightly from the page viewed minutes earlier.

[Source: product_information.md#stock-availability]
